issue_title: Update Scala settings file to replace "ts" prefix
issue_body_preview:
Thanks for the awesome Obsidian plugin! This PR hopefully addresses unexpected behavior when running Scala code blocks.
**Observed behavior:** 
Scala code blocks throw errors on run.
**Proposed change:** 
The button event listener in main.ts is looking for "scalaPath" and "scalaArgs" vars on the
test_description_zh: 在 Obsidian 中创建一个包含 Scala 代码块的笔记，点击代码块上的运行按钮，观察 Scala 代码是否能正常执行并输出结果。
expected_result_zh: 点击运行按钮后，Scala 代码块应正常执行，不抛出错误，并在代码块下方正确显示执行输出结果。
